title: About the Quarterly Local Authority Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Quarterly Local Authority Survey
21 September 2023, 10:45am
Information about taking part in the Quarterly Local Authority Survey, such as why we carry out the survey, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
We carry out this survey to collect quarterly information from local authorities, and make the combined statistics available to:
- provide information for publication of the Government Financial Statistics
- help in the preparation of New Zealand’s national accounts, price indexes, and related statistics
- help businesses, government, and other organisations in their planning and decision-making.
Of the 78 local authorities, and two council controlled organisations, we survey 38, and model the rest.
We select the 38 local authorities based on their sales, purchases, employee costs, and depreciation.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Quarterly Local Authority Survey.
The survey is carried out every quarter.

## How to complete the survey
You fill in an electronic (Excel) questionnaire.
- Contact us for survey help 26 May 2020
- Business survey information 31 July 2017
- Privacy, security, and confidentiality of survey data 20 May 2026
- Government finance 01 January 2017 Image: behive building
